## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website performance, and link building efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website migration caused temporary performance dip; new CMS (Craft) access granted](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Content backlog ready; publishing to resume once CMS access is fully set up](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Link building strategy progressing well, with focus on attracting high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Website speed issues identified, particularly on mobile, requiring attention](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration and CMS Update

  - [Website migration caused expected performance dip](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Colin gained access to Craft CMS; appears user-friendly](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Some redirect issues and 404 errors still present](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Team to get CMS access soon; video tutorial available](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [No new content published due to CMS transition](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Backlog of content ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [AI-related articles and Meta ad formats performing well](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [SERP volatility observed; rankings fluctuating week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [31 links acquired in \~2 months; aiming for 15-20 links/month](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Two-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
    1.  External link acquisition through publications
    2.  Creating "link magnet" content (e.g., statistics, case studies)
  - [Some blog posts already attracting high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Goal: Increase backlinks to 60-70 per month, boosting domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

### Upcoming Content Initiatives

  - [Articles addressing impact of tariffs on customers and ad budgets](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)

  - [Rebrand announcement preparation](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

  - [Slow loading animation and overall page speed issues identified](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [Mobile performance particularly concerning](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Colin to address these issues with the agency](https://fathom.video/share/SUDZqmaz6MmJypuKQAxzWV_FCDreQD2W?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
